name: CAMDEN NATIONAL CORP
summary: PART I Overview . Camden National Corporation (hereafter referred to as we, our, us, or the Company) is a publicly-held bank holding company, with $7.0 billion in assets at December 31, 2025, incorporated under the laws of the State of Maine and headquartered in Camden, Maine. Camden National Bank (the Bank), a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company, was founded in 1875.
